items.title: #24 Days to Purdue Basketball | Gicarri Harris
items.summary: On November 4th, Purdue will host Evansville in Mackey Arena to kick off the 2025-26 season. That means we are a Gicarri Harris (#24) number of days away from the season starting in earnest. Harris is one of the most intriguing options for Purdue headed into his sophomore campaign after an up and down true […]
